'''Control Zone Ltd.''' was a [[Cyborg/Legends|cyborg]] [[Cybernetics/Legends|prosthesis]] manufacturing company. Most of their cyborg limbs doubled as weapons, such as the [[repulse-hand]].

{{Company-stub}}
